title: Immunostaining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3cuij","text":"This immunohistochemistry protocol was developed to visualize pathological markers in AOF-PD tissue, focusing on phosphorylated alpha-synuclein (psyn), tyrosine hydroxylase (TH), and microglial marker Iba1, with quenching of endogenous peroxidases to reduce background. The protocol enables multiplexed fluorescent detection of dopaminergic neurons, microglia, and pathological alpha-synuclein aggregates, facilitating the study of neuroinflammatory and neurodegenerative features in Parkinsonian models.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"8kvv2","text":"All washing steps are performed for 10min and on a shaker","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

Ab113,  1:1000","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3uetl","text":"Mouse anti-Myc Cell Signaling, cat. 2276","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"di48","text":"Mouse anti-psyn Abcam cat. ab51253 1:1000 ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dsm9i","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dqsri","text":"Secondary Antibodies: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9c82m","text":"Donkey anti-goat 594 1:1000","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e82fg","text":"Donkey anti-rabbit 647 1:500","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3r3pu","text":"Donkey anti-mouse 488 1:1000","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"32jh1","text":"Neurotrace 455 (1:100)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"83did","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2eoda","text":"Solutions: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9mraf","text":"PBS-T Triton 0.2 % 150mL: 300uL Triton in 150mL PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"am95k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Washes Wash 3x in PBS-T, 10min each (0.2% Triton inPBS)
Quench Incubate in 3% H2O2 in PBST for 2hrs at room temperature inthe DARK! (x3)
Can be done the day before and sections can bestored in PBS overnight at 4 degrees C
Washes Wash 3x in PBS-T, 10min each (0.2% Triton in PBS)
Blocking Incubate in 3% BSA/PBS-T for 1 hr at room temperature
Primary Antibody Incubate in primary antibody (diluted in blocking solution) overnight.
Goat anti-Iba1 Iba1, WAKO, cat. 01919741 1:1500 Rabbit anti-TH Abcam, cat. Ab113, 1:1000 Mouse anti-Myc Cell Signaling, cat. 2276 Mouse anti-psyn Abcam cat. ab51253 1:1000
Secondary Antibody Incubate in secondary antibody (diluted in blocking solution) 1hr at room temperature
Donkey anti-goat 594 1:1000 Donkey anti-rabbit 647 1:500 Donkey anti-mouse 488 1:1000 Neurotrace 455 (1:100)
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
